focus: Awaiting fresh brief — trigger the GitHub Actions workflow to generate today's analysis.
btc_structure: Run the GitHub Actions workflow to generate today's Bitcoin analysis.
eth_flows: Run the GitHub Actions workflow to generate today's Ethereum analysis.
top_narratives: Trigger the workflow: GitHub → Actions → AI Market Brief → Run workflow.
The brief generates automatically every day at 07:00 UTC.
All sections will populate within 60 seconds of running the workflow.
Powered by live CoinGecko data, Fear & Greed index, and Claude AI.
macro_impact: Macro analysis will appear after the workflow runs.
whale_flows: Whale flow analysis will appear after the workflow runs.
funding_oi: Funding and OI analysis will appear after the workflow runs.
volatility_outlook: Volatility outlook will appear after the workflow runs.
full_report: The daily market brief is generated automatically by GitHub Actions. To generate it now: go to your repository, click Actions, click AI Market Brief, and click Run workflow. The fresh English brief will appear within 60 seconds.
